documents.text: The [BRAND] [MODEL] is a compact wet-dry vacuum designed for apartments, cars, and small workshops. Its 2.5-gallon tank and 3 peak HP motor deliver solid pickup for dust, wood chips, and minor liquid spills without taking much storage space. A lightweight body, top carry handle, and 10-foot power cord make it easy to move room to room. The unit includes a reusable cartridge filter, foam sleeve for wet pickup, crevice tool, utility nozzle, and 4-foot hose. Integrated cord wrap and onboard accessory storage help keep everything organized after cleanup.

Built for home garages and renovation cleanup, the [BRAND] [MODEL] wet-dry vacuum pairs a 4-gallon polypropylene tank with a 5 peak HP motor for stronger suction on debris and standing water. The balanced design rolls on four swivel casters and features a large power switch that is easy to use with gloves. Included are a locking hose, extension wands, floor nozzle, and detail brush for vehicle interiors. A rear blower port converts the vacuum into a quick leaf and dust blower, while the drainless tank keeps the body simple and lightweight.

The [BRAND] [MODEL] offers a practical blend of power and portability for DIY users who need one machine for dry messes and wet pickup. Its 6-gallon capacity reduces emptying frequency, while the 4.5 peak HP motor handles sawdust, pet hair, and workshop scraps with steady airflow. A washable pleated filter supports fine dust collection, and the included foam filter is suited for liquid recovery. This wet-dry vacuum uses a 7-foot hose and 16-foot cord for extended reach. Side latches, caster wheels, and onboard storage make setup and maintenance straightforward.

Designed for quieter operation, the [BRAND] [MODEL] wet-dry vacuum is ideal for shared spaces, indoor remodeling, and frequent household use. The 5-gallon tank is matched with a low-noise 8-amp motor that helps reduce sound without sacrificing useful suction. A flat powerhead design allows small item storage on top, and the wide wheelbase adds stability when pulling the unit over thresholds. Accessories include a combination floor tool, crevice nozzle, squeegee insert, and dusting brush. The washable filter system supports quick changeover between wet and dry jobs with minimal downtime.

The wall-mountable [BRAND] [MODEL] wet-dry vacuum is made for garages where floor space matters. Its 5-gallon tank stays off the ground when mounted, while the 6-foot locking hose and extension pieces give the user a generous cleaning radius for benches, shelves, and vehicle interiors. A remote on/off control built into the handle adds convenience during detail work. This model uses a 5 peak HP bypass motor for consistent suction and includes a blower function for clearing dust from corners. Accessory hooks and hose storage keep the setup neat between projects.

For medium-duty jobsite cleanup, the [BRAND] [MODEL] combines an 8-gallon drum with a 6 peak HP motor to handle heavier debris, damp plaster dust, and pooled water. The reinforced hose resists crushing, and the oversized drain port speeds emptying after wet collection. This wet-dry vacuum includes a fine-dust cartridge filter, foam wet filter, two extension wands, utility nozzle, and a large floor brush for broad passes across concrete or tile. A built-in power cord wrap, push handle, and durable rear wheels make transport easier around workshops and renovation sites.

The [BRAND] [MODEL] is a stainless steel wet-dry vacuum built for users who want a more durable tank and a polished workshop look. Its 10-gallon corrosion-resistant drum is paired with a 5.5 peak HP motor for collecting metal shavings, drywall dust, and accidental liquid spills. A front drain simplifies disposal, while the large lid latches help create a secure seal during operation. This model ships with a locking hose, claw utility nozzle, wet floor nozzle, and washable cartridge filter. Onboard accessory slots help keep attachments close at hand during busy cleanup tasks.

Engineered for detail cleaning, the [BRAND] [MODEL] wet-dry vacuum features a compact body with strong airflow, making it a smart choice for vehicle owners and hobby workspaces. The 3-gallon tank keeps the machine easy to carry, while the 4 peak HP motor provides enough suction for sand, crumbs, and small liquid messes. A flexible hose, precision crevice tool, dashboard brush, and upholstery nozzle support interior cleaning in tight spaces. The unit can also be used as a blower for drying mats or clearing debris. A washable filter helps reduce replacement costs over time.

The [BRAND] [MODEL] is a heavy-duty wet-dry vacuum aimed at contractors and serious workshop users. Its 12-gallon tank and 6.5 peak HP motor are suited for collecting sawdust, insulation scraps, nails, and water from demanding cleanup jobs. A built-in drain cap allows quick emptying, while the long 20-foot power cord extends reach across larger work areas. This model includes a rugged hose with positive locking connection, extension wands, floor nozzle, and car nozzle. Large rear wheels and front casters improve mobility over uneven surfaces such as garage floors and jobsite debris.

For workshops where airborne dust control matters, the [BRAND] [MODEL] wet-dry vacuum uses a HEPA-style filtration system that helps capture fine particles during sanding and cutting cleanup. The 9-gallon tank balances useful capacity with manageable size, and the 5 peak HP motor maintains strong pickup on dry debris and wet spills alike. A tool-triggered power outlet lets the vacuum start automatically with compatible saws or sanders, reducing mess at the source. Included accessories cover floor cleaning, crevice work, and liquid recovery. A stable drum base and locking casters keep the unit planted during use.

The [BRAND] [MODEL] delivers extra capacity for garages, basements, and small commercial spaces that see frequent wet and dry messes. This wet-dry vacuum features a 14-gallon drum, a 6 peak HP motor, and a wide hose designed to pass larger debris with fewer clogs. Dual locking extensions provide better control during floor cleaning, and the oversized drain makes water disposal simpler. The package includes a squeegee floor head, utility nozzle, crevice tool, and reusable cartridge filter. A built-in blower port adds versatility for clearing leaves, dust, and workshop scraps from outdoor areas.

Compact but capable, the [BRAND] [MODEL] wet-dry vacuum is intended for quick cleanups in laundry rooms, utility spaces, and compact workshops. Its 4-gallon tank and 3.5 peak HP motor offer dependable performance for dust, pet food, mud, and sink overflows. The ergonomic top handle allows one-handed carrying, and the short, stable base helps prevent tipping when the hose is pulled around furniture. Included accessories include a gulper nozzle, crevice tool, and reusable filter set for wet and dry pickup. Simple snap latches and a smooth interior tank make emptying and rinse-out easy.

The [BRAND] [MODEL] is a cordless wet-dry vacuum designed for users who need portability away from outlets. Powered by a removable 20V battery platform, it handles spot cleaning in vehicles, sheds, stairwells, and small renovation zones without dragging a power cord. The 2-gallon tank is paired with a high-efficiency motor that delivers focused suction for chips, dust, and minor liquid spills. A flexible hose, crevice nozzle, utility head, and washable filter come included. This model also offers sealed onboard storage and a compact footprint for easier transport and shelf storage.

Built for frequent garage use, the [BRAND] [MODEL] wet-dry vacuum combines a 16-gallon tank with a 6.5 peak HP motor for extended cleanup sessions. It is well suited for collecting wood dust, drywall debris, and water after appliance leaks or storm tracking. The extra-long hose and 18-foot cord provide broad working range, while the balanced dolly base helps the unit roll smoothly around obstacles. Included are a broad floor nozzle, wet squeegee insert, crevice tool, and extension wands. A quick-release drain and integrated blower port add convenience for multi-purpose cleanup tasks.

The [BRAND] [MODEL] targets workshop users who want strong suction and improved organization. This 6-gallon wet-dry vacuum features a 5 peak HP motor, locking casters, and molded storage points for the hose, wands, and nozzles so accessories stay with the machine. Its cartridge filter supports dry debris collection, while the foam sleeve handles wet pickup when cleaning spills or extracting water from small areas. The included utility nozzle and round brush suit both floor and bench cleaning. With a compact drum shape and durable side latches, it stores easily between weekend projects.

The [BRAND] [MODEL] is a professional-style wet-dry vacuum made for larger cleanup demands in workshops, warehouses, and renovation sites. Its 18-gallon drum works with a 6.5 peak HP motor to deliver high airflow and longer run time between emptying. A wide, crush-resistant hose improves pickup of bulky debris, while the front drain simplifies liquid disposal. This unit includes a floor tool, crevice attachment, extension wands, and a fine-dust filter for dry work. Heavy-duty casters, a reinforced handle, and a stable base help the vacuum move confidently across rough floors.
